title: Add dashboard page with charts and data tables
description: Create a new dashboard page at src/app/dashboard/page.tsx featuring charts and data tables. The page should display analytics data using chart visualizations and tabular data displays. Should follow existing dashboard patterns from src/app/(frontend)/dashboard/page.tsx and reuse dashboard components from src/components/dashboard/.
existing_patterns: src/app/(frontend)/dashboard/page.tsx - existing dashboard page pattern with server components, Payload auth, and data fetching
